channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Waymo Expands US Operations with Hyundai Partnership - Exclusive Electric Vehicle Deal
item.description: Waymo's robotaxi service expands in the United States with a partnership with Hyundai Motor. The South Korean automaker will provide electric vehicles for Waymo's fleet, further expanding its operations in the country.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
